mechanics.excerpt: If the situation is dire character can spend an Edge point and Complex Action to eliminate all of his Fatigue with no die roll required: WOUND EffECTS Wounds represent serious injuries that can cripple or kill character; The more wounds character suffers tne more like Iy it is he will suffer permanent injury or die Each wound type has wound value assigned t0 it (see the Wound Table 1141. This represents the relative severity tne wound and helps determine character' overall condition. Every wound character takes inflicts point of Fatigue on the character.
